name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: [4 hours left] We're almost there!
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e7c/24c69fd9/f1e6c3b0/18e3aac4/707983594/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact&source=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact")
---

Peter,

We're just hours away from our fundraising deadline, and we still need to raise $11,926 to hit our new End-of-Quarter goal.

This is our first big deadline of the year, and we're off to a strong start -- hitting our initial goal and then raising it.

But with Donald Trump pushing a dangerous and anti-choice agenda in the White House, the stakes are at an all-time high.

**Donate $3 before midnight to hit our $220,000 End-of-Quarter goal and support pro-choice Democratic women who will fight as hard as they can to protect progress:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-The-March-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e7c/24c69fd9/f1e6c3b0/18e3aac5/707983594/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitTheMarchGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact&source=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact")**

Thank you,
Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e7c/24c69fd9/f1e6c3b0/18e3aac6/707983594/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact&source=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e7c/24c69fd9/f1e6c3b0/18e3aac7/707983594/VEsC/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact&source=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e7c/24c69fd9/f1e6c3b0/18e3aac0/707983594/VEsD/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact&source=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e7c/24c69fd9/f1e6c3b0/18e3aac1/707983594/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact&source=WQEFE338N_digital_email_20170331_LastcallEOQ_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: before-midnight@dscc.org
subject: HURRY: Quadruple your support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
TRIPLE-MATCH your grassroots gift and send a message to Trump and the Republicans: there's no stopping Democrats from fighting back.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Midnight_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
***** CRITICAL FEC QUARTERLY DEADLINE: 4 HOURS! ***
[TRIPLE-MATCH ends at midnight! Pitch in ASAP to strike back at the GOP >> ](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Midnight_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
It's been quite a week, friend:
-> _**FIRST:**_ Senator Chuck Schumer announced he will filibuster Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominee (because NO Justice should be confirmed while the President is under FBI investigation). -> **_THEN:_** Republicans voted to strip away funding for Planned Parenthood, passed a bill that guts internet privacy protections, and Trump ANNIHILATED President Obama's efforts to solve the climate change crisis! -> _**NOW:**_ With the FEC deadline just hours away, we're counting on grassroots Democrats like you to show how ready we are to FIGHT BACK and keep the pressure on to stop the GOP! But we're still $73,351 away from hitting our goal with time running out FAST, friend -- and that means we need your help BIG TIME.

**Can we count on you to make a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift to close the gap? Hurry before midnight 's FEC deadline!**

******[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Midnight_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Midnight_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Midnight_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Midnight_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Midnight_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")**

We need to send a clear message about the momentum behind Senate Democrats to wage the fights ahead -- and show we're standing with millions of people across this country who are speaking out to resist the far-right's agenda.

**[That's why every $1 matters to QUADRUPLE your impact before the end-of-quarter closes, friend, but hurry! Chip in before the TRIPLE-MATCH expires at midnight >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Midnight_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2b4/2b07114c/59cd7205/736c80e5/1151406645/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2b4/2b07114c/59cd7205/736c80e4/1151406645/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2b4/2b07114c/59cd7205/736c80e7/1151406645/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Samantha Gross (via vanhollen.org)
subject: 34 and 25
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Wanted to make sure you saw Chris' email. There are 34 U.S. Senate seats up next year and 25 of them are members of the Democratic Caucus.

Chris is working tirelessly to make sure Senate Democrats win in 2018 and Donald Trump's efforts to expand his hold on the Senate fail. But he needs your help to make sure we have what it takes. Here's the link to give: [**http://action.vanhollen.org/cvh-march-2017**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b1f/70cdc2ba/47570845/397fc26/874758887/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/cvh-march-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+httpactionvanhollenorgcvhmarch2017&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")

Begin forwarded message:
> __
> Every day I feel the weight of the critical work we have before us: defending the principles and rights that are so fundamental to our democracy and pushing back against the reckless Trump/GOP agenda.
>
> Together my Senate Democratic colleagues and I represent the last, best line of defense against these extreme policies. That's why Trump is out there pushing GOP billionaires to raise funds to try to win a filibuster proof Senate in 2018. But we can't -- and won't -- let that happen.
>
> [**I 'm reaching out to you today, team to ask if you can help support the work I'm doing to make sure that Senate Democrats hold their seats in 2018? >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b1f/70cdc2ba/47570845/397fc27/874758887/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033117&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+reaching+out+to+you+today+team+t&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")
>
> As the new chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) it's my job to make sure that we are ready for whatever Republicans throw at the 25 members of the Senate Democratic Caucus up for reelection next year. It's a big job, but when Senator Schumer reached out I agreed because I know just how critical this next election will be to our party and our country.
>
> I hope I can count on grassroots champions like you to stick by me as I work to help our candidates, who will be under constant attack in the fight ahead.
>
> Right-wing groups are getting ready to spend over $10 million on the Supreme Court fight alone. We need to work together to push back hard against their disinformation campaigns and defend our members who need to win in states that helped elect Trump in 2016.
>
> I am working as hard as I can to make sure we meet and win that challenge. [**Can I count on you to join me? Contribute now to help out before tomorrow 's FEC deadline. >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b1f/70cdc2ba/47570845/397fc24/874758887/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033117&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+join+me+Contribute&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")
>
> **[Donate $3 now >>>](http://action.vanhollen. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033117&amount=3&&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")
> [Donate $10 now >>>](http://action.vanhollen. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033117&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")
> [Donate $25 now >>>](http://action.vanhollen. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033117&amount=25&&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")
> [Donate $50 now >>>](http://action.vanhollen. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033117&amount=50&&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")
> [Or donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-march17?refcode=em033117&amount=23&&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")**
> Thank you, once again, for being part of this important fight,
>
> Chris
>
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b1f/70cdc2ba/47570845/397fc3e/874758887/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b1f/70cdc2ba/47570845/397fc3f/874758887/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=10+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em033117&source=em033117") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: I'm asking, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I'm a goal-oriented guy. And because I'm guessing a few of you share that quality, I wanted to give you a quick update.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Schumer2-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

I'm a goal-oriented guy.

I trust my team, but I want people to tell me where things stand.

And because I'm guessing a few of you share that quality, I wanted to give you a quick update.

Earlier this week, we set a goal of raising $450,000 before midnight tonight.

As of a few moments ago, we're still $9,312 away from hitting that mark.

[**So before our first big fundraising deadline of the year, I 'm asking you to chip in $1.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Schumer2-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

This is pretty simple.

If 1,000 people step up in the next few hours, we'll be in great shape -- because every contribution between now and midnight will be triple-matched.

You're one of our best supporters, so I know can count on you.

Will you make a donation right now?

[**http://dscc.org/democrats-fight-back**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170331-Schumer2-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Chuck

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2b0/2b07114c/59df64bb/736c8129/834916819/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e2b0/2b07114c/59df64bb/736c8128/834916819/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. name: John Kasich
subject: Be among the first
body:
I wanted to share with you information about how you can preorder
my upcoming book.

Peter, I wanted to share with
you information about how you can preorder my upcoming book.

"Two Paths: America Divided or
United" offers a thoughtful reflection about what I learned about
America while traveling all over our great country. I hope that
it challenges your thinking and inspires you to take actions to
strengthen your own community.

The book is scheduled for release
on April 25th.

Please take a moment to visit
TwoPathsBook.com right now to learn more and consider preordering
your copy from the first edition printing.

I believe our nation can be
united again. The way forward is to focus on our shared moral
compass - the one that points us to honesty, integrity, personal
responsibility, faith, humility, compassion, forgiveness and
tolerance - that will get us back on track.

Thank you for your ongoing
support and I look forward to hearing your reviews!

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily: Weekend Edition
body:
Everything White House for your weekend. |

**WEEKEND EDITION**

President Donald J. Trump's Weekly Address to the Nation
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=666a0964eb612fd561844756812b2e8d647aa56b909c173f1065aad311005003e64999699a2b220efa4c7ecc70bde31b59345167f8268203)

Standing with Israel, Our Most Cherished Ally

President Trump and the First Lady Host the Women’s Empowerment Panel

**UPCOMING EVENTS**
**April 3rd:** President Trump welcomes President Al Sisi of Egypt to the White House

**April 17th:** President Trump and the First Lady host the 139th Annual White House Easter Egg Roll on the South Lawn

name: Team Kaine
subject: Re: Judge Gorsuch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek -- Did you see Tim's email? He's voting NO on Neil Gorsuch for the Supreme Court.

Tim didn't come to this decision hastily. He spent months carefully reviewing Judge Gorsuch's legal opinions and statements, and listening to legal experts as well as constituents. But in the end, it was clear that with the judge's history of taking an activist approach on issues of women's heath, Judge Gorsuch is the wrong fit for the Supreme Court.

Tim stood up for Virginians -- now will you stand up for him? He has a tough reelection race, and every dollar you can give will make a big difference! **[Please chip in today.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=veIf9sYSqSoKdRHPiyz%2BCwHszH7mMZlY)**

\-- Team Kaine

\---_Original Message_ \---
From: Tim Kaine
Subject: Judge Gorsuch

Friend,

I have spent a lot of time over the last 6 months weighing the Supreme Court nomination of Judge Gorsuch. I met with him, read dozens of his opinions, and spoke to legal experts and lawyers who have appeared before his court. And I have heard a lot from my constituents. Based on this homework, I have decided to vote no on the nomination.

What stands out about Judge Gorsuch's history of rulings is his repeatedly activist approach to cases involving a woman's right to make her own decisions about her health.

Judge Gorsuch has taken extraordinary steps to force reconsideration of rulings that safeguard access to reproductive health care. He has argued that employers have a right to prevent their company's female employees from using _their own_ health insurance to buy contraception. And he has even referred to women making their own choices about contraception as "the wrongdoing of others."

**Friend, these rulings and statements do not demonstrate the type of judicial philosophy we need on the nation 's highest court. [Will you stand with me and call on the Senate to vote no on Judge Gorsuch?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=rT7sYza2RmFAaIIqpSHFebv%2B3zYN3LQf)**

Many of Judge Gorsuch's other decisions have been equally troubling. He has ruled against workers' rights, disabled students, and so many other Americans who were only seeking fair treatment under the law.

**My first consideration is how Judge Gorsuch 's rulings would affect Virginians, and I am troubled by what I have seen in his record.** I am opposing Judge Gorsuch for the Supreme Court, and I'd like to know you have my back, friend. **[Will you add your name to call on the Senate to vote no on Judge Gorsuch?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=SST%2FNQ2c45JqxsphHfoOzAHszH7mMZlY)**

Thanks,
Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BJ64m1tQzzFH1Ly9%2BuuHlpjNeBX0K9KM)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HLjATq1VKIc7uUH%2BSk3twgHszH7mMZlY).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Tim stood up for Virginians -- now will you stand up for him? name: Jeff Weaver, OurRevolution.com
subject: FW: Bernie Sanders' "Medicare for All" bill
body:
Medicare for All is the only way to solve our health care crisis
#
Hi there,
In case you missed yesterday's livestream, Bernie Sanders told a roaring crowd that he'll be introducing this month a Medicare for All bill he's currently drafting.
It's not too late to add your name to the thank you card I'll be delivering to Bernie. **[Add your name and I'll make sure he knows that you're standing with him when it comes to fighting for universal health care and Medicare for All.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e6ab/970505013/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/we-support-bernie-sanders-and-medicare-for-all?source=em170401-kick")**
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
\---------Forwarded Message---------
From: Jeff Weaver
To: Our Revolution Progressives
Subj: Bernie Sanders' "Medicare for All" bill

Sisters and Brothers,
Senator Bernie Sanders announced that he's going to be introducing a Medicare for All bill in the Senate.
We all know that the Affordable Care Act was a critically important step towards the goal of universal health care. But 29 million Americans today still do not have health insurance, and millions more are underinsured because health insurance companies are making our health care unaffordable and inaccessible.
Bernie Sanders' Medicare for All bill puts power and choice when it comes to health care decisions right where it should be -- in the hands of patients and their doctors, because nobody should be squeezed by the insurance industry's bottom line.
[**Will you join me in telling Senator Bernie Sanders "thank you" for never giving up when it comes to universal health care for all Americans? Sign the thank you card today to say that you're with him.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e6ab/970505013/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/we-support-bernie-sanders-and-medicare-for-all?source=em170401-kick")
I've known Senator Sanders for more than 30 years. He has championed universal health care for even longer. Bernie has always stood up for the people, even if it means going up against the establishment. The insurance industry, which spent $146 MILLION in 2016 alone lobbying Congress, will say that universal health care isn't possible. Not only is it possible*, Medicare for All is the only way to solve our health care crisis.
That's why Our Revolution is joining with communities all across the country to win this critical fight. We're supporting Rob Quist, a strong advocate for universal health care, who is running for Montana's at-large Congressional district in the upcoming special election.
This isn't some fringe issue: **58 percent of Americans support a Medicare for All system**.** Our issue is national, and it's personal. Too many Americans lie awake at night wondering how they'll pay for much-needed treatment or medications. Americans are dying of entirely preventable causes. Ensuring universal health care through a Medicare for All program is a moral imperative that we cannot ignore.
[**Join me in thanking Bernie Sanders for his leadership on Medicare for All, and say that you're all-in for universal health care.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e6ab/970505013/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/we-support-bernie-sanders-and-medicare-for-all?source=em170401-kick")
Keep up the fight, because together we're transforming this country.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President
Our Revolution
\--------------------
*Medicare for All _is_ possible: [**here's a map of nations that provide universal health care for all.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e6a8/970505013/VEsC/ "https://www.theatlantic.com/international/archive/2012/06/heres-a-map-of-the-countries-that-provide-universal-health-care-americas-still-not-on-it/259153/?utm_source=ourrevolution")
**Americans expect more: **[**58% of Americans support Medicare for all.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e6a9/970505013/VEsD/ "http://www.gallup.com/poll/191504/majority-support-idea-fed-funded-healthcare-system.aspx?utm_source=ourrevolution")**
****[SIGN HERE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e6ab/970505013/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/we-support-bernie-sanders-and-medicare-for-all?source=em170401-kick")****
** **
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e656/970505013/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e657/970505013/VEsO/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0aaf/43f17890/dc72f451/6203e654/970505013/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: EMILY's List
subject: Four governor's races that need your help
body:
